meaning: n.俱乐部,夜总会,社,棍棒,(高尔夫球等的)球棒,(扑克牌)梅花vt.棍打,协作,联合,把...当棍棒用
examples: We had lunch at the golf club.
He belongs to an exclusive club.
The next player discarded a club.
The financially-troubled club announced last Friday that Todd will relinquish his executive role on 1 January.
Meanwhile, winger Nabil El Zhar has joined Greek club PAOK on a season-long loan.
